creator: amdmi3@amdmi3.ru
text:
games/sturmbahnfahrer should be moved to games/stormbaancoureur, and the attached patch applied.

* the project was renamed (Sturmbahnfahrer -> Stormbaan Coureur)
* update from 1.4 to 2.0.0

If the update does not compile, most probably it's devel/ode problem (see ports/119084). Please put this PR on hold in this case.

I'll be offline till 5th. Happy new year all FreeBSD people!
